indicators.name: large dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is too large and lacks a dedicated workspace for computer work.

indicators.name: open-plan layout
indicators.rationale: The open-plan layout makes it difficult to focus on computer work due to potential distractions from other areas of the house.

indicators.name: low lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting appears to be low, which may affect visibility and concentration during computer work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The large dining table and open-plan layout make it challenging to focus on computer work, while the low lighting may impact visibility and concentration. However, there are no major barriers to setting up a workspace, so a score of 4 is appropriate.
